title: Property Consultant - Embassy Group Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Embassy Group Digital Technologies - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Embassy Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Embassy Group Digital Technologies:
Embassy Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
